name: Black Velvet Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle half a cup of almonds on the bottom of a greased 10-inch tube pan. Set aside the rest of the almonds and chocolate chips.
2. In a mixer bowl, combine the remaining ingredients. Beat for 4 minutes.
3. Fold in the chocolate chips and almonds, then pour into the prepared pan.
4. Bake at 350°F for 60 to 70 minutes.
5. Cool for 15 minutes before removing from the pan.
6. Serve with whipped cream if desired.
Note: For an added touch, puncture the cooled cake with a long-tined fork and dribble over about a quarter cup of Kahlua. Serve with sweetened whipped cream flavored with almond or vanilla extract.
